args.content:
Hawaii Packing List
Emma Johnson's Vacation: June 10th – June 20th, 2024

============================================================
CLOTHING
============================================================
- Swimwear (at least 2–3 sets for beach days and kayaking)
- Lightweight shorts and tank tops
- Casual outfits for dinners and shopping (Ala Moana Center)
- One or two sundresses or aloha shirts for the Luau (June 16)
- Light jacket or hoodie for cooler evenings
- Comfortable hiking clothes (moisture-wicking) for Diamond Head (June 13)
- Undergarments and socks (enough for 10 days)
- Flip-flops / sandals
- Comfortable walking / hiking shoes
- Water shoes (for snorkeling at Hanauma Bay and kayaking at Kailua)

============================================================
TOILETRIES & PERSONAL CARE
============================================================
- Sunscreen (reef-safe, SPF 50+ recommended)
- After-sun lotion / aloe vera gel
- Insect repellent
- Shampoo, conditioner, body wash (travel-size)
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Deodorant
- Razor and shaving cream
- Makeup (if desired)
- Hairbrush / comb
- Lip balm with SPF

============================================================
GEAR & EQUIPMENT
============================================================
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins) — or confirm rental at Hanauma Bay
- Dry bag / waterproof phone pouch (for kayaking and beach days)
- Daypack or small backpack (for hiking Diamond Head and road trips)
- Reusable water bottle (stay hydrated!)
- Camera (with extra memory cards and batteries)
- Portable phone charger / power bank
- Beach bag or tote
- Sunglasses
- Hat or cap for sun protection
- Beach towel or quick-dry towel

============================================================
TRAVEL DOCUMENTS & ESSENTIALS
============================================================
- Passport or government-issued ID
- Flight tickets / boarding passes (printed or digital)
- Hotel reservation confirmation
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit / debit cards and some cash
- Driver's license (for North Shore road trip on June 15)
- Printed itinerary and emergency contact numbers
- Copy of important documents (stored separately or digitally)

============================================================
HEALTH & SAFETY
============================================================
- First-aid kit (band-aids, antiseptic wipes, pain relievers)
- Motion sickness medication (for boat/road trips)
- Prescription medications (enough for the full trip)
- Hand sanitizer and wipes

============================================================
ENTERTAINMENT & COMFORT
============================================================
- Book or e-reader (for relaxation day at the spa on June 17)
- Headphones / earbuds
- Travel pillow (for the flight)
- Snacks for the road trip to the North Shore

============================================================
NOTES
============================================================
- Check weather forecast a few days before departure and adjust accordingly.
- Pack light — leave room for souvenirs from Ala Moana Center!
- Confirm snorkeling gear rentals in advance if not bringing your own.
- Bring a light, respectful outfit for the Pearl Harbor visit (June 14).

Safe travels and enjoy Hawaii! 🌺🌊
